name: discornect
html: discornec
css: .dc-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0d1b2a 0%, #1a2f45 60%, #0f2030 100%); overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-direction: column; } .dc-rain { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; } .dc-drop { position: absolute; top: -10%; width: 2px; border-radius: 0 0 2px 2px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(120,200,255,0.15) 30%, rgba(160,220,255,0.7) 100%); animation: dc-fall linear infinite; } .dc-drop:nth-child(1)  { left: 3%;  height: clamp(12px,4vh,24px); animation-duration: 0.8s;  animation-delay: 0.0s;  opacity: 0.7; } .dc-drop:nth-child(2)  { left: 7%;  height: clamp(10px,3vh,20px); animation-duration: 1.1s;  animation-delay: 0.3s;  opacity: 0.5; } .dc-drop:nth-child(3)  { left: 12%; height: clamp(14px,5vh,28px); animation-duration: 0.75s; animation-delay: 0.6s;  opacity: 0.8; } .dc-drop:nth-child(4)  { left: 18%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,20px); animation-duration: 1.0s;  animation-delay: 0.1s;  opacity: 0.6; } .dc-drop:nth-child(5)  { left: 23%; height: clamp(16px,5vh,30px); animation-duration: 0.85s; animation-delay: 0.9s;  opacity: 0.75; } .dc-drop:nth-child(6)  { left: 29%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,22px); animation-duration: 0.95s; animation-delay: 0.4s;  opacity: 0.6; } .dc-drop:nth-child(7)  { left: 34%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,18px); animation-duration: 1.2s;  animation-delay: 0.7s;  opacity: 0.5; } .dc-drop:nth-child(8)  { left: 40%; height: clamp(14px,5vh,26px); animation-duration: 0.78s; animation-delay: 0.2s;  opacity: 0.8; } .dc-drop:nth-child(9)  { left: 46%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,24px); animation-duration: 0.9s;  animation-delay: 0.55s; opacity: 0.65; } .dc-drop:nth-child(10) { left: 51%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,20px); animation-duration: 1.05s; animation-delay: 0.15s; opacity: 0.55; } .dc-drop:nth-child(11) { left: 57%; height: clamp(16px,5vh,30px); animation-duration: 0.82s; animation-delay: 0.8s;  opacity: 0.8; } .dc-drop:nth-child(12) { left: 62%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,22px); animation-duration: 0.72s; animation-delay: 0.35s; opacity: 0.7; } .dc-drop:nth-child(13) { left: 68%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,18px); animation-duration: 1.15s; animation-delay: 0.65s; opacity: 0.5; } .dc-drop:nth-child(14) { left: 73%; height: clamp(14px,5vh,26px); animation-duration: 0.88s; animation-delay: 0.05s; opacity: 0.75; } .dc-drop:nth-child(15) { left: 79%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,24px); animation-duration: 0.98s; animation-delay: 0.45s; opacity: 0.6; } .dc-drop:nth-child(16) { left: 84%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,20px); animation-duration: 1.1s;  animation-delay: 0.75s; opacity: 0.55; } .dc-drop:nth-child(17) { left: 89%; height: clamp(16px,5vh,28px); animation-duration: 0.76s; animation-delay: 0.25s; opacity: 0.8; } .dc-drop:nth-child(18) { left: 94%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,22px); animation-duration: 0.92s; animation-delay: 0.5s;  opacity: 0.65; } .dc-drop:nth-child(19) { left: 5%;  height: clamp(10px,3vh,18px); animation-duration: 1.3s;  animation-delay: 1.1s;  opacity: 0.45; } .dc-drop:nth-child(20) { left: 15%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,24px); animation-duration: 0.83s; animation-delay: 1.4s;  opacity: 0.7; } .dc-drop:nth-child(21) { left: 25%; height: clamp(14px,5vh,26px); animation-duration: 0.93s; animation-delay: 1.2s;  opacity: 0.6; } .dc-drop:nth-child(22) { left: 35%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,20px); animation-duration: 1.0s;  animation-delay: 1.6s;  opacity: 0.5; } .dc-drop:nth-child(23) { left: 45%; height: clamp(16px,5vh,30px); animation-duration: 0.77s; animation-delay: 1.0s;  opacity: 0.8; } .dc-drop:nth-child(24) { left: 55%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,22px); animation-duration: 1.08s; animation-delay: 1.3s;  opacity: 0.6; } .dc-drop:nth-child(25) { left: 65%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,18px); animation-duration: 0.86s; animation-delay: 1.5s;  opacity: 0.55; } .dc-drop:nth-child(26) { left: 75%; height: clamp(14px,5vh,28px); animation-duration: 0.79s; animation-delay: 1.15s; opacity: 0.75; } .dc-drop:nth-child(27) { left: 85%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,24px); animation-duration: 1.18s; animation-delay: 1.45s; opacity: 0.5; } .dc-drop:nth-child(28) { left: 91%; height: clamp(10px,3vh,20px); animation-duration: 0.84s; animation-delay: 1.7s;  opacity: 0.65; } .dc-drop:nth-child(29) { left: 97%; height: clamp(16px,5vh,30px); animation-duration: 0.96s; animation-delay: 0.9s;  opacity: 0.7; } .dc-drop:nth-child(30) { left: 10%; height: clamp(12px,4vh,22px); animation-duration: 1.25s; animation-delay: 1.9s;  opacity: 0.45; } @keyframes dc-fall { 0%   { transform: translateY(-10%); opacity: 0; } 10%  { opacity: 1; } 90%  { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(110vh); opacity: 0; } } .dc-letters { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; gap: 0.04em; font-family: 'Arial Black', Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 8vw, 3.5rem); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: lowercase; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(100,200,255,0.6)) drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)); } .dc-letters span { display: inline-block; animation: dc-wave 1.6s ease-in-out infinite, dc-hue 4s linear infinite; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0s,    0s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.12s, -0.4s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.24s, -0.8s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.36s, -1.2s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.48s, -1.6s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.60s, -2.0s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.72s, -2.4s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.84s, -2.8s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(9)  { animation-delay: 0.96s, -3.2s; } .dc-letters span:nth-child(10) { animation-delay: 1.08s, -3.6s; } @keyframes dc-wave { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-0.35em); } } @keyframes dc-hue { 0%   { color: hsl(0,   100%, 65%); } 16%  { color: hsl(60,  100%, 65%); } 33%  { color: hsl(120, 100%, 60%); } 50%  { color: hsl(180, 100%, 60%); } 66%  { color: hsl(240, 100%, 70%); } 83%  { color: hsl(300, 100%, 65%); } 100% { color: hsl(360, 100%, 65%); } } .dc-puddles { position: absolute; bottom: 8%; width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: space-around; padding: 0 10%; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 1; } .dc-puddle { border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(120,200,255,0.3); width: clamp(16px, 5%, 30px); height: clamp(6px, 2%, 12px); animation: dc-ripple 1.8s ease-out infinite; } .dc-puddle:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; } .dc-puddle:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.6s; } .dc-puddle:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 1.2s; } @keyframes dc-ripple { 0%   { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.8; } 100% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; } } .dc-umbrella { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 0.85em; height: 0.85em; vertical-align: middle; } .dc-umb-svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: visible; animation: dc-wave 1.6s ease-in-out infinite, dc-hue-svg 4s linear infinite; animation-delay: 1.08s, -3.6s; } .dc-umb-canopy { fill: currentColor; } .dc-umb-shaft { stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; } .dc-umb-hook { stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; } @keyframes dc-hue-svg { 0%   { color: hsl(0,   100%, 65%); } 16%  { color: hsl(60,  100%, 65%); } 33%  { color: hsl(120, 100%, 60%); } 50%  { color: hsl(180, 100%, 60%); } 66%  { color: hsl(240, 100%, 70%); } 83%  { color: hsl(300, 100%, 65%); } 100% { color: hsl(360, 100%, 65%); } }
